query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  userId, 
  displayName, 
  livesRemaining, 
  totalPoints, 
  currentStreak
FROM participants 
WHERE LOWER(displayName) LIKE '%chest%' OR LOWER(displayName) LIKE '%ches%'
ORDER BY displayName;
